input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.3.1.9 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.3.1.9
            TITLE: in side view any portion of the brake system that is mounted on the sprung part of the vehicle

            CONTENT:
            rule T.3.1.9: In side view any portion of the Brake System that is mounted on the sprung part of the vehicle
T.3.1.9 In side view any portion of the Brake System that is mounted on the sprung part of the vehicle 
must not project below the lower surface of the chassis

final_answer: In side view any portion of the Brake System that is mounted on the sprung part of the vehicle must not project below the lower surface of the chassis
